networkmanager.site.Description.Docs: A description of your site.  Constraints: Maximum length of 256 characters.

networkmanager.site.GlobalNetworkId.Docs: The ID of the global network.

networkmanager.site.Location.Docs: The site location. This information is used for visualization in the Network Manager console. If you specify the address, the latitude and longitude are automatically calculated.  +  `Address`: The physical address of the site.+  `Latitude`: The latitude of the site. +  `Longitude`: The longitude of the site.
